name: Darrell Issa
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $238,853 for Darrell Issa in U.S. House, CA-48. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
